hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; bn=$(basename "$f"); cd "/Users/Nate.Simpkins/Claude Projects/weekly-mix-tools" && git add "$f" && git -c user.email="nate.simpkins@ticketmaster.com" -c user.name="Nate Simpkins" commit -m "Update $bn" && git push origin main; } 2>/dev/null || true
